description: Detects resource exhaustion risks in Go: unbounded goroutine spawning in loops. JSON version matches for_statement containing statement_list containing go_statement. Languages field scoped to go only to avoid conflict with Rust resource_exhaustion pipeline (same pipeline name). Go grammar wraps block contents in statement_list node. Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: goroutine spawned in loop without bound may exhaust resources
